_comment: Hand-derived, same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Added beyond WP-05 step 7's literal fixture list specifically to exercise the mm->m UnitNormalizer conversion the WP-05 Tests line requires ('mm→m normalization') -- base-knowledge.md §2's only named odd-base-unit example is Distance in millimeters. Raw wire value is 15000mm; UnitNormalizerTests / GoogleDataPointDecodingTests assert the decoded GoogleDataPoint.values["distance"] == 15.0 (meters).
